title: Negative Adverbs of Frequency 否定頻率副詞句
titleZh: 「Negative Adverbs of Frequency 否定頻率副詞句」

source.file: Sentence Structure 96 -「Negative Adverbs of Frequency 否定頻率副詞句」.pdf

formula: Subject + be + not always / usually / often + other information

formulas.formula: Subject + be + not + always / usually / often + other information

formulas.labelEn: With be and a negative frequency adverb
formulas.labelZh: Be 動詞配合否定頻率副詞
formulas.formula: Subject + be + rarely / seldom / hardly ever / never + other information

formulas.labelEn: With an ordinary verb and not
formulas.formula: Subject + do / does / did + not + always / usually / often + base verb

formulas.labelEn: With an ordinary verb and a negative frequency adverb
formulas.labelZh: 一般動詞配合否定頻率副詞
formulas.formula: Subject + rarely / seldom / hardly ever / never + main verb

formulas.labelZh: 配合情態動詞或助動詞
formulas.formula: Subject + modal / auxiliary + not + always / usually / often + verb

example: Long-term investment is not always a waste of money.
exampleZh: 長期投資不一定是浪費金錢。

examples.en: Long-term investment is not always a waste of money.
examples.zh: 長期投資不一定是浪費金錢。

examples.en: Our teacher is rarely late for class.
examples.zh: 我們的老師很少上課遲到。

examples.en: Ben does not often watch television on weekdays.

examples.zh: 克洛伊很少在網上買衣服。

examples.en: You cannot always trust information shared online.
examples.zh: 你不能總是相信網上分享的資料。

meaning.zh: 否定頻率副詞及相關表達用來表示某件事並非每次發生、通常不會發生、很少發生，或完全不會發生。

rules.zh: Not always 表示某件事有時成立，但並非每次都成立；它不等於 never。
rules.en: Not always means that something is true on some occasions but not on every occasion; it does not mean never.
examples: Long-term investment is not always a waste of money.

rules.zh: Rarely、seldom、hardly ever 和 never 本身已帶有否定或限制意思，不要在它們之前再加 not。
rules.en: Do not add not before an already negative frequency adverb.

rules.zh: 一般動詞配合否定頻率表達時，按主語和時態使用 do、does 或 did。
rules.en: Use do, does or did with ordinary verbs.
examples: I do not often eat late at night.
He does not usually take a taxi.

rules.zh: 頻率副詞放在 be 動詞之後。
examples: The answer is not always obvious.

rules.zh: 本練習集中訓練正常語序，不包括把 rarely 或 seldom 放在句首所形成的倒裝句。
rules.en: This exercise uses normal word order rather than initial rarely or seldom with inversion.

benefits.zh: 這個句型能幫助你避免作出過分絕對的判斷，並表明事情可能存在例外。
benefits.en: It helps you avoid statements that are too absolute.

benefits.zh: 你可以準確區分「通常不會發生」、「很少發生」和「完全不會發生」。
benefits.en: It lets you describe frequency more precisely.

benefits.zh: Not always 和 not usually 可以讓觀點更加公平和全面。
benefits.en: It makes opinions sound fairer and more balanced.

benefits.zh: 這些表達適合用於討論、作文和簡報，協助分析存在例外的現實說法。
benefits.en: It is useful in discussions, essays and presentations.

benefits.zh: 除了反覆使用 sometimes，也可以使用不同的否定頻率表達，令句式更有變化。
benefits.en: It gives you alternatives to repeatedly using sometimes.

benefits.zh: 固定句框可以幫助你在說話時迅速組織觀點。
benefits.en: It provides a useful speaking frame.

en: Rewrite each sentence using the negative frequency expression shown in brackets.
Preserve the original meaning, tense and important details.
The first word of each answer has been provided.
zh: 使用括號內的否定頻率表達改寫以下句子。
答案須保留原句的意思、時態及重要資料。
每題已提供答案的第一個字。

questions.prompt: It is wrong to say that long-term investment is a waste of money in every case.
questions.promptZh: 認為長期投資在任何情況下都是浪費金錢，是不正確的。
questions.answer: Long-term investment is not always a waste of money.
questions.answerZh: 長期投資不一定是浪費金錢。
questions.highlight: Long-term investment is not always a waste of money.

questions.prompt: There are some school days when Mia skips breakfast.
questions.promptZh: 米婭有些上學日不吃早餐。
questions.answer: Mia does not always eat breakfast before school.
questions.answerZh: 米婭並非每天上學前都吃早餐。
questions.highlight: Mia does not always eat breakfast before school.

questions.prompt: The bus is crowded on many mornings, but not on every morning.
questions.promptZh: 這輛巴士很多早上都很擠迫，但並非每天早上都是如此。
questions.answer: The bus is not always crowded in the morning.
questions.answerZh: 這輛巴士並非每天早上都很擠迫。
questions.highlight: The bus is not always crowded in the morning.

questions.prompt: Drinking coffee after dinner is not part of my normal routine.
questions.promptZh: 晚飯後喝咖啡並不是我的日常習慣。
questions.answer: I do not usually drink coffee after dinner.
questions.answerZh: 我通常不會在晚飯後喝咖啡。
questions.highlight: I do not usually drink coffee after dinner.

questions.prompt: Ben watches television on weekdays only occasionally.
questions.promptZh: 本只會偶爾在平日看電視。
questions.answer: Ben does not often watch television on weekdays.
questions.answerZh: 本在平日不常看電視。
questions.highlight: Ben does not often watch television on weekdays.

questions.prompt: It is unusual for our teacher to be late for class.
questions.promptZh: 我們的老師很少上課遲到。
questions.answer: Our teacher is rarely late for class.
questions.answerZh: 我們的老師很少上課遲到。
questions.highlight: Our teacher is rarely late for class.

questions.prompt: Chloe buys clothes online on very few occasions.
questions.promptZh: 克洛伊只有在極少數情況下才會在網上買衣服。
questions.answer: Chloe seldom buys clothes online.
questions.answerZh: 克洛伊很少在網上買衣服。
questions.highlight: Chloe seldom buys clothes online.

questions.prompt: We eat out on Monday evenings on almost no occasions.
questions.promptZh: 我們幾乎不會在星期一晚上外出用膳。
questions.answer: We hardly ever eat out on Monday evenings.
questions.answerZh: 我們幾乎不會在星期一晚上外出用膳。
questions.highlight: We hardly ever eat out on Monday evenings.

questions.prompt: There is no occasion when Leo leaves his bicycle unlocked.
questions.promptZh: 里奧從來不會讓自己的單車在沒有上鎖的情況下停放。
questions.answer: Leo never leaves his bicycle unlocked.
questions.answerZh: 里奧從來不會讓自己的單車不上鎖。
questions.highlight: Leo never leaves his bicycle unlocked.

questions.prompt: The school library is quiet at lunchtime on some days, but not on all days.
questions.promptZh: 學校圖書館在部分日子的午膳時間很安靜，但並非每天都是如此。
questions.answer: The school library is not always quiet at lunchtime.
questions.answerZh: 學校圖書館在午膳時間並非每天都很安靜。
questions.highlight: The school library is not always quiet at lunchtime.

questions.prompt: There were times when Sarah disagreed with the other members of her group.
questions.promptZh: 莎拉有時會不同意小組其他成員的意見。
questions.answer: Sarah did not always agree with the other members of her group.
questions.answerZh: 莎拉並非一直同意小組其他成員的意見。
questions.highlight: Sarah did not always agree with the other members of her group.

questions.prompt: Stopping on every floor is not the lift’s normal pattern.
questions.promptZh: 在每一層停下並不是這部升降機的正常運作模式。
questions.answer: The lift does not usually stop on every floor.
questions.answerZh: 這部升降機通常不會在每一層停下。
questions.highlight: The lift does not usually stop on every floor.

questions.prompt: I forget people’s names only from time to time.
questions.promptZh: 我只是偶爾忘記別人的名字。
questions.answer: I do not often forget people’s names.
questions.answerZh: 我不常忘記別人的名字。
questions.highlight: I do not often forget people’s names.

questions.prompt: Daniel feels nervous before presentations on very few occasions.
questions.promptZh: 丹尼爾只有在極少數情況下才會在簡報前感到緊張。
questions.answer: Daniel is rarely nervous before presentations.
questions.answerZh: 丹尼爾很少在簡報前感到緊張。
questions.highlight: Daniel is rarely nervous before presentations.

questions.prompt: It is uncommon for my grandparents to travel during public holidays.
questions.promptZh: 我的祖父母很少在公眾假期出門旅遊。
questions.answer: My grandparents seldom travel during public holidays.
questions.answerZh: 我的祖父母很少在公眾假期出門旅遊。
questions.highlight: My grandparents seldom travel during public holidays.

questions.prompt: This printer works properly almost all the time.
questions.promptZh: 這部打印機幾乎一直都能正常運作。
questions.answer: This printer hardly ever causes problems.
questions.answerZh: 這部打印機幾乎從不出現問題。
questions.highlight: This printer hardly ever causes problems.

questions.prompt: There is no situation in which the nurse discusses patients in public.
questions.promptZh: 護士在任何情況下都不會在公眾地方談論病人的資料。
questions.answer: The nurse never discusses patients in public.
questions.answerZh: 護士從不在公眾地方談論病人的資料。
questions.highlight: The nurse never discusses patients in public.

questions.prompt: You cannot trust information shared online in every case.
questions.promptZh: 你不能在所有情況下都相信網上分享的資料。
questions.answer: You cannot always trust information shared online.
questions.answerZh: 你不能總是相信網上分享的資料。
questions.highlight: You cannot always trust information shared online.

questions.prompt: In most cases, a high price does not mean better quality.
questions.promptZh: 在大多數情況下，價格高並不代表品質較好。
questions.answer: A high price does not usually mean better quality.
questions.answerZh: 價格高通常並不代表品質較好。
questions.highlight: A high price does not usually mean better quality.

questions.prompt: Friday meetings are uncommon for our team.
questions.promptZh: 我們的團隊很少在星期五舉行會議。
questions.answer: Our team does not often hold meetings on Fridays.
questions.answerZh: 我們的團隊不常在星期五舉行會議。
questions.highlight: Our team does not often hold meetings on Fridays.

questions.prompt: The museum closes on some public holidays.
questions.promptZh: 博物館會在部分公眾假期關閉。
questions.answer: The museum is not always open on public holidays.
questions.answerZh: 博物館並非在每個公眾假期都開放。
questions.highlight: The museum is not always open on public holidays.

questions.prompt: Ava lives in Hong Kong now, but she lived somewhere else during part of her life.
questions.promptZh: 艾娃現時居於香港，但她在人生中的一段時間曾居於其他地方。
questions.answer: Ava has not always lived in Hong Kong.
questions.answerZh: 艾娃並非一直居於香港。
questions.highlight: Ava has not always lived in Hong Kong.

questions.prompt: Serious side effects from the medicine are uncommon.
questions.promptZh: 這種藥物很少引起嚴重副作用。
questions.answer: The medicine does not usually cause serious side effects.
questions.answerZh: 這種藥物通常不會引起嚴重副作用。
questions.highlight: The medicine does not usually cause serious side effects.

questions.prompt: Small changes in air quality are noticed by people only occasionally.
questions.promptZh: 人們只會偶爾留意到空氣質素的輕微變化。
questions.answer: People do not often notice small changes in air quality.
questions.answerZh: 人們不常留意到空氣質素的輕微變化。
questions.highlight: People do not often notice small changes in air quality.

questions.prompt: Blockages on this road after midnight are very uncommon.
questions.promptZh: 這條道路在午夜後很少出現阻塞。
questions.answer: The road is rarely blocked after midnight.
questions.answerZh: 這條道路在午夜後很少出現阻塞。
questions.highlight: The road is rarely blocked after midnight.

questions.prompt: It is unusual for the manager to change a decision without new evidence.
questions.promptZh: 經理很少會在沒有新證據的情況下改變決定。
questions.answer: The manager seldom changes a decision without new evidence.
questions.answerZh: 經理很少會在沒有新證據的情況下改變決定。
questions.highlight: The manager seldom changes a decision without new evidence.

questions.prompt: The backup system works successfully in almost every test.
questions.promptZh: 後備系統幾乎在每次測試中都能成功運作。
questions.answer: The backup system hardly ever fails during testing.
questions.answerZh: 後備系統在測試期間幾乎從不失靈。
questions.highlight: The backup system hardly ever fails during testing.

questions.prompt: There is no situation in which these rules apply to emergency vehicles.
questions.promptZh: 這些規則在任何情況下都不適用於緊急車輛。
questions.answer: These rules never apply to emergency vehicles.
questions.answerZh: 這些規則從不適用於緊急車輛。
questions.highlight: These rules never apply to emergency vehicles.

questions.prompt: Students should question the first answer in some cases rather than accept it every time.
questions.promptZh: 學生在部分情況下應質疑找到的第一個答案，而不是每次都接受它。
questions.answer: Students should not always accept the first answer they find.
questions.answerZh: 學生不應每次都接受自己找到的第一個答案。
questions.highlight: Students should not always accept the first answer they find.

questions.prompt: There are cases in which a simple solution does not solve the whole problem.
questions.promptZh: 在部分情況下，簡單的解決方法不能解決整個問題。
questions.answer: A simple solution may not always solve the whole problem.
questions.answerZh: 簡單的解決方法未必每次都能解決整個問題。
questions.highlight: A simple solution may not always solve the whole problem.

questions.prompt: Some weather forecasts are inaccurate.
questions.promptZh: 部分天氣預報並不準確。
questions.answer: The weather forecast is not always accurate.
questions.answerZh: 天氣預報並非每次都準確。
questions.highlight: The weather forecast is not always accurate.

questions.prompt: Before Emily moved, taking the underground was not part of her normal routine.
questions.promptZh: 艾米莉搬家前，乘搭地下鐵路並不是她的日常習慣。
questions.answer: Emily did not usually take the underground before she moved.
questions.answerZh: 艾米莉搬家前通常不乘搭地下鐵路。
questions.highlight: Emily did not usually take the underground before she moved.

questions.prompt: Replacing equipment that still works is uncommon in the company.
questions.promptZh: 公司很少更換仍然運作正常的設備。
questions.answer: The company does not often replace equipment that still works.
questions.answerZh: 公司不常更換仍然運作正常的設備。
questions.highlight: The company does not often replace equipment that still works.

questions.prompt: Only a small number of older buildings were designed for modern technology.
questions.promptZh: 只有少數較舊的建築物在設計時有考慮現代科技。
questions.answer: Older buildings were rarely designed for modern technology.
questions.answerZh: 較舊的建築物在設計時很少有考慮現代科技。
questions.highlight: Older buildings were rarely designed for modern technology.

questions.prompt: Complaints from the customer are uncommon unless an order is late.
questions.promptZh: 除非訂單延誤，否則這名顧客很少作出投訴。
questions.answer: The customer seldom complains unless an order is late.
questions.answerZh: 除非訂單延誤，否則這名顧客很少投訴。
questions.highlight: The customer seldom complains unless an order is late.

questions.prompt: False alarms from our smoke alarm are extremely uncommon.
questions.promptZh: 我們的煙霧警報器極少發出錯誤警報。
questions.answer: Our smoke alarm hardly ever goes off by mistake.
questions.answerZh: 我們的煙霧警報器幾乎從不錯誤響起。
questions.highlight: Our smoke alarm hardly ever goes off by mistake.

questions.prompt: Under no circumstances does the clinic share personal records without permission.
questions.promptZh: 診所在任何情況下都不會在未經同意下分享個人紀錄。
questions.answer: The clinic never shares personal records without permission.
questions.answerZh: 診所從不在未經同意下分享個人紀錄。
questions.highlight: The clinic never shares personal records without permission.

questions.prompt: Restarting the computer during an update is normally not recommended.
questions.promptZh: 電腦進行更新期間，通常不建議重新啟動電腦。
questions.answer: You should not usually restart the computer during an update.
questions.answerZh: 你通常不應在電腦更新期間重新啟動電腦。
questions.highlight: You should not usually restart the computer during an update.

questions.prompt: A person can reply in a friendly way and still disagree.
questions.promptZh: 一個人即使以友善方式回覆，仍可能不同意對方。
questions.answer: A friendly reply does not always mean that someone agrees.
questions.answerZh: 友善的回覆不一定代表對方同意。
questions.highlight: A friendly reply does not always mean that someone agrees.

questions.prompt: In some cases, the cheapest option costs more over time.
questions.promptZh: 在部分情況下，最便宜的選擇長遠而言反而花費更多。
questions.answer: The cheapest option will not always cost the least in the long run.
questions.answerZh: 最便宜的選擇長遠而言未必每次都是花費最少的選擇。
questions.highlight: The cheapest option will not always cost the least in the long run.

questions.prompt: During rush hour, another form of transport can sometimes be faster than public transport.
questions.promptZh: 繁忙時間內，其他交通方式有時可能比公共交通更快。
questions.answer: Public transport is not always the fastest choice during rush hour.
questions.answerZh: 公共交通在繁忙時間不一定是最快的選擇。
questions.highlight: Public transport is not always the fastest choice during rush hour.

questions.prompt: It is uncommon for a rule that works in one classroom to work equally well in every classroom.
questions.promptZh: 一項在某間課室有效的規則，很少會在每間課室都同樣有效。
questions.answer: A rule that works in one classroom does not usually work equally well in every classroom.
questions.answerZh: 一項在某間課室有效的規則，通常不會在每間課室都同樣有效。
questions.highlight: A rule that works in one classroom does not usually work equally well in every classroom.

questions.prompt: Policy changes without public consultation have been uncommon for the committee.
questions.promptZh: 該委員會很少在沒有公眾諮詢的情況下改變政策。
questions.answer: The committee has not often changed its policy without public consultation.
questions.answerZh: 該委員會很少在沒有公眾諮詢的情況下改變政策。
questions.highlight: The committee has not often changed its policy without public consultation.

questions.prompt: Only in very few cases is medical advice found online suitable for every patient.
questions.promptZh: 網上找到的醫療建議只有在極少數情況下才適合每一名病人。
questions.answer: Medical advice found online is rarely suitable for every patient.
questions.answerZh: 網上找到的醫療建議很少會適合每一名病人。
questions.highlight: Medical advice found online is rarely suitable for every patient.

questions.prompt: It is unusual for the organisation to introduce a new system before testing it carefully.
questions.promptZh: 這個機構很少會在仔細測試前引入新系統。
questions.answer: The organisation seldom introduces a new system before testing it carefully.
questions.answerZh: 這個機構很少會在仔細測試前引入新系統。
questions.highlight: The organisation seldom introduces a new system before testing it carefully.

questions.prompt: In almost every situation, the emergency team uses more than one communication channel.
questions.promptZh: 緊急應變團隊幾乎在每種情況下都會使用多於一個通訊渠道。
questions.answer: The emergency team hardly ever relies on one communication channel alone.
questions.answerZh: 緊急應變團隊幾乎從不只依賴一個通訊渠道。
questions.highlight: The emergency team hardly ever relies on one communication channel alone.

questions.prompt: There is no situation in which a responsible leader ignores evidence that challenges a decision.
questions.promptZh: 負責任的領袖在任何情況下都不會忽視對某項決定提出質疑的證據。
questions.answer: A responsible leader never ignores evidence that challenges a decision.
questions.answerZh: 負責任的領袖從不忽視對某項決定提出質疑的證據。
questions.highlight: A responsible leader never ignores evidence that challenges a decision.

questions.prompt: There are situations in which a method that already works well should be kept instead of being replaced by new technology.
questions.promptZh: 在部分情況下，行之有效的方法應該保留，而不是由新科技取代。
questions.answer: New technology should not always replace a method that already works well.
questions.answerZh: 新科技不應每次都取代行之有效的方法。
questions.highlight: New technology should not always replace a method that already works well.

questions.prompt: After every step is considered, something that first looks efficient may sometimes fail to save time.
questions.promptZh: 考慮所有步驟後，起初看來有效率的做法有時可能無法節省時間。
questions.answer: What looks efficient at first may not always save time once every step is considered.
questions.answerZh: 考慮所有步驟後，起初看來有效率的做法未必每次都能節省時間。
questions.highlight: What looks efficient at first may not always save time once every step is considered.

questions.prompt: Some people in unusual situations may still have unmet needs under policies designed for the majority.
questions.promptZh: 在為大多數人而設的政策下，部分處於特殊情況的人仍可能有未獲滿足的需要。
questions.answer: Policies designed for the majority do not always meet the needs of people in unusual situations.
questions.answerZh: 為大多數人而設的政策，並非每次都能滿足處於特殊情況人士的需要。
questions.highlight: Policies designed for the majority do not always meet the needs of people in unusual situations.
